title: xanthium echinatum var. italicum
intro: Xanthium echinatum var. italicum, also known as itch grass, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae and is commonly found in various parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, thanks to its health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation. Xanthium echinatum var. italicum is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
